data.content:
CWE-841	Reentrancy Attack
vulnerability,workflow
Reentrancy Attack is related to CWE-841 because it demonstrates an improper enforcement of behavioral workflow by allowing external calls to disrupt the intended control flow.

Bank	ModifierEntrancy
contract interaction,vulnerability demonstration
ModifierEntrancy interacts with the Bank contract to demonstrate the reentrancy vulnerability.

Atzei N.	SimpleDAO
authorship,code origin
Atzei N. is an author of the SimpleDAO smart contract.

Checks-Effects-Interactions Pattern	Reentrancy Attack
prevention,smart contract security
The Checks-Effects-Interactions Pattern is a recommended method to avoid Reentrancy Attacks by controlling the order of operations in smart contracts.

ModifierEntrancy	Nu Token
contract feature,token management
ModifierEntrancy manages balances of Nu Token.

Bartoletti M.	SimpleDAO
authorship,code origin
Bartoletti M. is an author of the SimpleDAO smart contract.

Reentrancy Attack	ReentrancyGuard
prevention,security library
ReentrancyGuard is a tool used to prevent Reentrancy Attacks by providing a reentrancy lock.

Credit	Donate
modification,storage
The donate function increases the credit balance of the recipient address.

Cimoli T	SimpleDAO
authorship,code origin
Cimoli T is an author of the SimpleDAO smart contract.

Donate	Msg.value
deposit,payment
The donate function receives Ether as input.

Credit	Withdraw
balance check,decrement
The withdraw function reduces the credit balance of the sender's address.

Josselin Feist	SimpleDAO
code contribution,modification
Josselin Feist modified the SimpleDAO smart contract.

Address	Donate
payment,transfer
The donate function receives the recipient address as input.

Amount	Msg.sender
request,transfer
The msg.sender requests to withdraw a specified amount.

Bernhard Mueller	SimpleDAO
code contribution,modification
Bernhard Mueller modified the SimpleDAO smart contract.

Credit	Msg.sender
balance,ownership
The withdraw function transfers Ether to msg.sender.

Reentrancy Attack	SimpleDAO
attack vector,vulnerability
SimpleDAO is vulnerable to the Reentrancy Attack.

Credit	QueryCredit
lookup,retrieval
The queryCredit function returns the credit balance of the specified address.

CWE-664	Floating Pragma
resource control,security
Floating pragma can lead to improper control of resources as described by CWE-664.

Ethereum	Solidity
language,platform
Solidity is used for writing smart contracts on the Ethereum platform.

Eea Ethtrust Security Levels	Floating Pragma
compiler,security
The use of floating pragma is related to various security levels defined in the EEA EthTrust Security Levels.

Compiler	Floating Pragma
security,versioning
Floating Pragma affects which Compiler version is used, impacting security and functionality.

Ethpm	Floating Pragma
dependency,package management
Floating pragma are allowed when a contract is intended for consumption by other developers, as in the case with contracts in an EthPM package.

data.tgt_id: Recommended Practice Use The Latest Compiler
data.content:
Compiler	Recommended Practice Use The Latest Compiler
best practice,version control
The use of the latest compiler version is recommended to avoid known bugs.

Compiler	Github
bug tracking,version control
Github is used to track known bugs for the compiler version.

CWE-937	Outdated Compiler Version
component,vulnerability
Using an outdated compiler version is an instance of using components with known vulnerabilities, as categorized by CWE-937.

Solidity Compiler	Solidity Release Notes
documentation,version information
Solidity Release Notes provide information on different versions of the Solidity compiler.

EEA EthTrust Security Levels	Outdated Compiler Version
security level,standard
Using an outdated compiler version is addressed within the EEA EthTrust Security Levels, which define guidelines for compiler security.

Etherscan Solidity Bug Info	Solidity Compiler
bug information,documentation
Etherscan Solidity Bug Info contains information about solidity bugs.

Version 0.4.13	Version 0.8.21
compiler version,version comparison
Version 0.8.21 is a more recent version of the Solidity compiler compared to version 0.4.13.

Latest Compiler	Outdated Compiler Version
risk mitigation,update
Using an outdated compiler version is discouraged; using the latest compiler is recommended for security.

EEA EthTrust Security Levels	Improved Compilers
enhancement,security level
Improved Compilers are referenced within EEA EthTrust Security Levels.

OutdatedCompilerVersion Contract	Version 0.4.13
contract version,declaration
OutdatedCompilerVersion contract uses pragma solidity 0.4.13

Compiler Security Bugs	EEA EthTrust Security Levels
security level,vulnerability
Compiler Security Bugs are referenced within EEA EthTrust Security Levels.

Outdated Compiler Version	Version 0.4.13
compiler version,outdated
Version 0.4.13 is identified as an outdated compiler version.

Compiler Bugs And Overriding Requirements	EEA EthTrust Security Levels
security level,vulnerability
Compiler Bugs and Overriding Requirements are referenced within EEA EthTrust Security Levels.

Msg.sender	SimpleSuicide
destruction,ownership
SimpleSuicide contract destructs the contract and sends the remaining ether to the message sender.

CWE-284	SELFDESTRUCT Instruction
access control,vulnerability
Unprotected SELFDESTRUCT instruction relates to improper access control vulnerabilities (CWE-284).

Gav Wood	WalletLibrary.sol
author,code
Gav Wood is listed as an author of the WalletLibrary.sol contract.

Msg.sender	SuicideMultiTxFeasible
destruction,ownership
SuicideMultiTxFeasible contract destructs the contract and sends the remaining ether to the message sender.

Protect Self-destruction	SELFDESTRUCT Instruction
security measure,standard
Protecting the SELFDESTRUCT instruction aligns with the EthTrust Security Level requirement for Protect Self-destruction.

Owner Index	Pending.OwnersDone
confirmation,tracking
Owner Index is used to check the status of owner confirmations in pending transactions.

Daily Limit	Today
spending control,time frame
Daily Limit manages the amount that can be spent within the timeframe of Today.

Msg.sender	SuicideMultiTxInfeasible
destruction,ownership
SuicideMultiTxInfeasible contract destructs the contract and sends the remaining ether to the message sender.

Enforce Least Privilege	SELFDESTRUCT Instruction
access control,standard
Protecting the SELFDESTRUCT instruction aligns with the EthTrust Security Level requirement for Enforce Least Privilege.

Msg.Data	SetDailyLimit
function call,input
Msg.data is used as input for SetDailyLimit, requiring owner confirmation via sha3.

Daily Limit	Multiowned
authorization,spending control
Multiowned ensures that changes to Daily Limit require authorization from multiple owners.

Parity "I accidentally killed it" Bug	SELFDESTRUCT Instruction
historical incident,vulnerability
The Parity "I accidentally killed it" bug is an example of a vulnerability caused by the SELFDESTRUCT instruction.

Daily Limit	Execute
spending control,transaction
Execute checks if the transaction is under the Daily Limit before executing.

InitWallet	Multiowned
dependency,initialization
InitWallet calls InitMultiowned to initialize the owner array and required confirmations.

Multi-sig Scheme	SELFDESTRUCT Instruction
access control,security
Implementing a multi-sig scheme is a recommended remediation for securing the SELFDESTRUCT instruction.

New Limit	SetDailyLimit
parameter,setting
New Limit is the parameter passed to SetDailyLimit to update the daily spending limit.

Create	InvalidJumpLabel
error handling,execution failure
Create uses InvalidJumpLabel to handle errors during contract creation.

Block.Number	Execute
transaction,unique hash
Execute uses Block.number in generating the transaction hash.

Confirm	M_Txs
data retrieval,transaction
Confirm uses M_txs to retrieve transaction details based on its hash.

Kill	Multiowned
authorization,control
Kill function requires authorization from multiple owners via sha3(msg.data).

Daily Limit	InitDaylimit
initialization,parameter setting
InitDaylimit sets the initial Daily Limit for the contract.

OnlyManyOwners	SetDailyLimit
access control,authorization
SetDailyLimit can only be called by many owners, as enforced by OnlyManyOwners.

ConfirmationNeeded	Execute
event trigger,transaction
Execute triggers the ConfirmationNeeded event when a transaction requires confirmation.

M_NumOwners	Only_Uninitialized
control flow,initialization
Only_Uninitialized checks M_NumOwners to prevent initialization after the contract has already been initialized.

Kill	Suicide
contract termination,fund transfer
Kill function uses Suicide to self-destruct and transfer the contract's funds.

InitDaylimit	M_LastDay
day tracking,initialization
InitDaylimit also sets the initial M_lastDay.

Execute	_To
destination,transaction
Execute sends the transaction to the address specified by _To.

OnlyManyOwners	ResetSpentToday
access control,authorization
ResetSpentToday can only be called by many owners, as enforced by OnlyManyOwners.

InitDaylimit	InitWallet
dependency,initialization
InitWallet calls InitDaylimit to initialize the daily limit settings.

Confirm	MultiTransact
confirmation,event trigger
Confirm triggers the MultiTransact event after successful confirmation.

Execute	_Value
transaction,value transfer
Execute sends the amount of Ether specified by _Value in a transaction.

ConfirmAndCheck	Owner Index
confirmation process,identification
ConfirmAndCheck determines the Owner Index of the sender to verify their confirmation.

M_Pending	Operation
pending operations,storage
M_Pending stores data related to the Operation.

Execute	_Data
data transfer,transaction
Execute sends the data specified by _Data in a transaction.

M_PendingIndex	Operation
indexing,storage
M_PendingIndex stores indices of pending operations, including the Operation.

OwnerIndex	OwnerIndexBit
calculation,confirmation process
The OwnerIndex is used to calculate the OwnerIndexBit, which is used in the confirmation process.

Execute	M_Required
execution control,threshold
Execute checks if M_Required is equal to 1 which dictates the number of required confirmations for a transaction.

M_OwnerIndex	M_Owners
indexing,mapping
M_OwnerIndex maps the owner addresses stored in M_Owners to their respective indices.

Msg.Sender	Owner Index
association,mapping
The Owner Index is determined based on the Msg.Sender.

M_DailyLimit	M_SpentToday
comparison,limit check
M_SpentToday is checked against M_DailyLimit to ensure spending remains within the limit.

M_LastDay	Today
comparison,reset condition
Today is compared to M_LastDay to determine if the spending limit should be reset.

Execute	SingleTransact
event trigger,transaction
Execute triggers the SingleTransact event when a single transaction is executed.

M_numOwners	initMultiowned
initialization,ownership count
initMultiowned initializes m_numOwners with the length of the _owners array plus one.

Confirmation	Msg.Sender
confirmation,event trigger
The Confirmation event is triggered by the Msg.Sender confirming an operation.

Data	Msg.Sender
access,data handling
The message sender interacts with data during transaction processing.

OwnerIndex	revoke
ownership,validation
OwnerIndex is the index of the owner revoking the operation, used to ensure the revoker is an owner.

M_owners	initMultiowned
address assignment,ownership
initMultiowned assigns the addresses of the owners to the m_owners array.

M_Owners	Msg.Sender
confirmation,ownership
Checks if the Msg.Sender is among the authorized M_Owners.

M_ownerIndex	initMultiowned
index mapping,ownership
initMultiowned maps the addresses of the owners to their index in the m_owners array.

_from	changeOwner
owner replacement,ownership
_from is the address of the owner being replaced in the multi-signature wallet.

_operation	revoke
operation,revoking
_operation is the operation being revoked by the owner.

_owner	addOwner
adding owner,ownership
_owner is the address of the owner being added to the multi-signature wallet.

M_required	initMultiowned
confirmation threshold,setting requirement
initMultiowned sets the required number of confirmations for operations.

Msg.sender	initMultiowned
initial owner,ownership
initMultiowned sets the message sender as the first owner.

_to	changeOwner
new owner,ownership
_to is the address of the new owner replacing the old owner in the multi-signature wallet.

C_maxOwners	addOwner
limit,max owners validation
addOwner is validated against the maximum allowed number of owners(C_maxOwners).

_owner	removeOwner
ownership,removing owner
_owner is the address of the owner being removed from the multi-signature wallet.

_newRequired	changeRequirement
confirmation,setting requirement
_newRequired is the new number of confirmations required for operations in the multi-signature wallet.

Msg.sender	revoke
event trigger,revoking confirmation
Msg.sender is the address of the owner who is revoking the confirmation of the operation.

_addr	isOwner
address,owner check
_addr is checked to see if it matches owner

_operation	hasConfirmed
checking confirmation,operation
_operation to check confirmation on

M_owners	addOwner
assigning owner,ownership
new owner (_owner) address is being added to m_owners

_limit	initDaylimit
intial daily limit,setup
_limit is the limit for the day

M_ownerIndex	addOwner
assigning owner,ownership
Owner index of new owner (_owner) address is being added to m_ownerIndex

Address[] _owners	M_numOwners
initialization,size determination
The length of the _owners array determines the initial value of m_numOwners.

M_required	Uint _required
confirmation threshold,initialization
M_required is initialized with the value of _required, setting the confirmation threshold.

_owner	hasConfirmed
checking confirmation,owner
_owner to check confirmation for

M_ownerIndex	Msg.sender
first owner indexing,initialization
The index of msg.sender as an owner is initialized in m_ownerIndex.

M_dailyLimit	initDaylimit
daily limit,setup
M_dailyLimit is set to _limit value.

M_lastDay	initDaylimit
lastDay,setup
M_lastDay is initialized

Cwe-824	Uninitialized Storage Pointer
pointer issue,vulnerability
Uninitialized Storage Pointer is related to the CWE-824 vulnerability (Access of Uninitialized Pointer).

Crypto Roulette	Uninitialized Storage Pointer
contract code,vulnerability
The CryptoRoulette contract contains an example of the Uninitialized Storage Pointer vulnerability.

Sigma Prime	Uninitialized Storage Pointer
analysis,technical article
SigmaPrime wrote about Uninitialised Storage Pointers in their solidity-security-blog.

Crypto Roulette	Thec00n
authorship,smart contract
Thec00n is the author of the smart contract CryptoRoulette.

Solidity	Uninitialized Storage Pointer
contract code,programming language
Uninitialized Storage Pointers can occur in Solidity smart contracts.
